title: Home Screen - Charger case pop up appears after 1st, 3rd, 5th, 10th 15th... app launch
scenario: Charger case pop-up dialog appears repeatedly on multiple app launches instead of only on first connection when case firmware is outdated
steps: Ensure the charge case is on outdated firmware.
Launch the app for the first time and observe the charger case pop-up dialog.
Launch the app for the second time and observe the charger case pop-up dialog.
Launch the app for the third time and observe the charger case pop-up dialog.
Continue launching and closing the app multiple times (e.g., 5th, 10th, 13th, 15th launch) and observe the pop-up dialog each time.
expected: The charger case pop-up dialog should appear only on the first connection (first app launch).
